title: LLM & Agent Testing
shortDescription: A comprehensive QA pipeline evaluating Large Language Models, prompts, and dynamic autonomous AI agents using Promptfoo and DeepEval.
fullDescription: A Proof-of-Concept for AI Systems Testing & Evaluation. It ensures generative AI applications are reliable, accurate, and aligned with business guardrails before reaching production.
features: Prompt Regression Testing with Promptfoo to evaluate matrices and assert LLM guardrails
Autonomous Agent logic evaluation via DeepEval on LangChain components
Cost-free evaluation wrappers using Groq (Llama 3) for metrics
Offline, interactive analytics Streamlit Dashboard built with Plotly

title: AI Test Generator
shortDescription: Intelligent web tool generating high-quality test cases and Playwright scripts prioritized through ML-based risk scoring models.
fullDescription: An intelligent fintech QA web tool that combines a Groq-powered LLM with a Random Forest ML model to generate, risk-score and prioritize test cases from plain-English user stories.
features: Generates 10–15 Gherkin-style test cases per User Story via Llama 3.3 70B
ML Risk Scoring with Random Forest — predicts High / Medium / Low defect likelihood
SHAP Waterfall Plots — full model explainability per test case
Batch CSV backlog upload — prioritize thousands of stories without API calls
Downloads a ready-to-run Playwright POM Framework + GitHub Actions CI pipeline

title: AI QA Pipeline
shortDescription: Intelligent regression testing pipeline combining traditional QA automation with data-driven insights to drastically reduce cycle feedback loop times.
fullDescription: An intelligent regression testing pipeline that merges traditional QA automation with data-driven insights to reduce test cycle times and increase release confidence.
features: Automated regression suite triggered on every push via GitHub Actions
Data-driven test selection — only runs tests relevant to changed modules
Integrates with Jira / ticketing systems for defect traceability
Publishes test result dashboards after every pipeline run

title: QA Intelligence Lab
shortDescription: A resilience testing and experimentation platform combining chaos engineering, traditional QA automation and interactive data analysis dashboards.
fullDescription: A resilience testing and experimentation platform combining chaos engineering with traditional QA automation and interactive data analysis dashboards for deep quality observability.
features: Chaos Engineering experiments to validate system resilience under fault conditions
Interactive dashboards tracking defect density, coverage and release health
Modular test harness integrating multiple QA automation tools
Reporting engine exportable to CSV / PDF stakeholder formats

title: Cypress E2E Framework
shortDescription: A custom-built robust automation framework engineered with Cypress using POM implementation principles specifically designed for UI scalability.
fullDescription: A production-grade Cypress E2E automation framework built on Page Object Model principles. Designed for scalable UI test coverage across complex SaaS applications.
features: Full Page Object Model (POM) architecture for maximum maintainability
Custom Cypress commands and reusable component utilities
CI-ready with GitHub Actions integration and Mochawesome HTML reports

title: Cypress Automation Core
shortDescription: This is a custom-built Cypress automation framework designed to facilitate UI testing. The framework is structured around Page Object Model (POM) principles for better scalability and maintainability. It is intended to be used with a sample web application, which can be tested using Docker or directly from the source repository.
fullDescription: This is a custom-built Cypress automation framework designed to facilitate UI testing. The framework is structured around Page Object Model (POM) principles for better scalability and maintainability. It is intended to be used with a sample web application, which can be tested using Docker or directly from the source repository.
